candidate_pool.pool_description: Post-bootstrap optional weighted refit bundle (M51 optional_weighted_refit)
candidate_pool.notes: Sole coherent primary candidate from closed PX1-M01; no fabricated pre-refit comparison candidate.

opponent_profiles.non_claim: Not a distinct scripted ladder opponent; frozen M02 burnysc2 harness profile A (seed/horizon) for bounded evaluation series only.
Not a distinct heuristic ladder opponent; frozen M02 burnysc2 harness profile B (distinct seed) for bounded evaluation series only.

frozen_parameters.selection_rule: choose highest bounded evidence-backed candidate that satisfies the frozen protocol; if tie, prefer candidate with stronger declared demo-opponent performance, then stable deterministic tiebreak

non_claims: PX1-M02 is bounded play-quality evaluation and demo-candidate selection only — not ladder/public strength, not global benchmark integrity, not replay↔execution equivalence.
Opponent profiles are bounded local match harness configurations — not public ladder equivalence.
PX1-M03 (governed demo proof / winning video) does not open automatically from PX1-M02.
v2 does not open automatically from PX1-M02.
PX1-M01 proved industrial full-run threshold-met — not play quality or demo/video proof.
